query: Could you arrange a 5-day travel plan for two individuals, leaving from Cedar Rapids and visiting two cities in Texas from March 11th until March 15th, 2022? Our budget is set at $2,400. Our accommodations must allow visitors. Regarding dining, we enjoy Mediterranean, Indian, Italian, and Chinese cuisines. And please ensure that our travels do not involve any flights, as we prefer other modes of transportation.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Cedar Rapids to Dallas, duration: 12 hours 26 mins, distance: 1,324 km, cost: 66
plan.attraction: The Dallas World Aquarium;Reunion Tower;Klyde Warren Park;
Dallas Museum of Art;The Sixth Floor Museum at Dealey Plaza;Dallas Zoo;

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Dallas to Austin, duration: 2 hours 53 mins, distance: 314 km, cost: 15
plan.attraction: Texas Capitol;Zilker Metropolitan Park;Bullock Texas State History Museum;
plan.accommodation: Cozy room in south Harlem - 10 mins to Columbia, Austin

plan.attraction: Umlauf Sculpture Garden & Museum;Haunted ATX;Austin Nature & Science Center;
plan.accommodation: Cozy room in south Harlem - 10 mins to Columbia, Austin

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Austin to Cedar Rapids, duration: 15 hours 5 mins, distance: 1,695 km, cost: 84
